name: DCDC LOGOS Monitor
description: NILE DCDC LOGOS 2nd Gen (Destin Power) legacy
registers:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!--
  DCDC (NILE LOGOS 2nd Gen) profile - registers.xml
  Built from reference/NILE_DCDC_LOGOS_2ndGen Release/Conf.

  Mostly a stub: monitoring details come from ProtocolDefinition.xml at
  runtime. The protocol addresses below match the C# ProtocolConst values
  for the legacy LOGOS DCDC firmware.
-->
<modbus>

  <profile>
    <name>DCDC LOGOS Monitor</name>
    <description>NILE DCDC LOGOS 2nd Gen (Destin Power) — legacy profile</description>
    <version>1.0</version>
  </profile>

  <communication>
    <slaveId>1</slaveId>
    <baudRate>115200</baudRate>
    <dataBits>8</dataBits>
    <parity>none</parity>
    <stopBits>1</stopBits>
    <pollIntervalMs>1000</pollIntervalMs>
    <timeoutMs>1000</timeoutMs>
      <transport>serial</transport>
      <tcpBridge>ws://localhost:8765</tcpBridge>
      <tcpHost></tcpHost>
      <tcpPort>502</tcpPort>
  </communication>

  <!-- Protocol addresses match NILE_DCDC ProtocolConst.cs -->
  <protocols>
    <history requestAddr="3100" eventReadAddr="1900" eventReadCount="3"/>
    <trace requestAddr="3101" readAddr="1000" blockSize="20" totalWords="400"
           channelCount="12" paramStartAddr="2008"
           commandAddr="3000" stopValue="6" restartValue="7"/>
    <fault startAddr="20" quantity="8" warningStartBit="64" warningDescOffset="15"/>
    <parameter baseAddr="2000"/>
      <traceFlash sectorRegAddr="5000" sectorCount="30"
                channelBase="5010" channelCount="12"
                samplesPerCh="200" scale="10"/>
  </protocols>

  <externalFiles>
    <parameter src="config/parameter.xml"/>
    <events src="config/EventDefinition.xml"/>
    <faults src="config/FaultDescription.xml"/>
    <protocolDefinition src="config/ProtocolDefinition.xml"/>
    <traceChannels src="config/TraceChannels.xml"/>
    <controls src="config/controls.xml"/>
  </externalFiles>

  <!-- Minimal enum set — extend as needed. -->
  <enums>
    <enum id="pcs_command">
      <item value="0" label="-"/>
      <item value="1" label="System ON"/>
      <item value="2" label="System OFF"/>
      <item value="3" label="Fault Reset"/>
      <item value="4" label="Parameter Init"/>
      <item value="5" label="History Init"/>
      <item value="6" label="Trace Stop"/>
      <item value="7" label="Trace Restart"/>
      <item value="8" label="System Reboot"/>
    </enum>
  </enums>

  <bitfields/>

  <!-- A small set of common monitoring registers (from ProtocolDefinition).
       Use Settings tab to add more or load a richer registers.xml. -->
  <registers>
    <register addr="0"   name="manufacture_info" label="Manufacture Info" type="uint16" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="2"   name="sw_version"       label="Software Version" type="uint16" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="3"   name="param_version"    label="Parameter Version" type="uint16" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="20"  name="battery_v"        label="Battery V"        type="uint16" unit="V"  scale="10"  decimals="1" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="21"  name="dc_current"       label="DC Current"       type="uint16" unit="A"  scale="10"  decimals="1" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="22"  name="dclink_v"         label="DC Link V"        type="uint16" unit="V"  scale="10"  decimals="1" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="23"  name="dc_power"         label="DC Power"         type="uint16" unit="kW" scale="10"  decimals="1" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="45"  name="ac_power_p"       label="AC Power P"       type="uint16" unit="kW" scale="10"  decimals="1" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="46"  name="grid_power_q"     label="Grid Power Q"     type="uint16" unit="kvar" scale="10" decimals="1" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="47"  name="power_factor"     label="Power Factor"     type="uint16" scale="1000" decimals="3" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="49"  name="status_info"      label="Status Info"      type="uint16" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="71"  name="cabinet_temp"     label="Cabinet Temp"     type="uint16" unit="℃" scale="1" decimals="0" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="3000" name="pcs_command"     label="PCS Command"      type="uint16" access="W" enum="pcs_command"/>
  </registers>

  <display>
    <view id="status">
      <group title="Info">
        <item ref="manufacture_info"/>
        <item ref="sw_version"/>
        <item ref="param_version"/>
        <item ref="status_info"/>
      </group>
      <group title="DC">
        <item ref="battery_v"/>
        <item ref="dc_current"/>
        <item ref="dclink_v"/>
        <item ref="dc_power"/>
      </group>
      <group title="AC">
        <item ref="ac_power_p"/>
        <item ref="grid_power_q"/>
        <item ref="power_factor"/>
      </group>
      <group title="Temp">
        <item ref="cabinet_temp"/>
      </group>
    </view>

    <pollGroups>
      <block view="status" start="0"  count="4"/>
      <block view="status" start="20" count="4"/>
      <block view="status" start="45" count="5"/>
      <block view="status" start="71" count="1"/>
    </pollGroups>
  </display>

  <!-- Control commands moved to config/controls.xml -->


  <logging>
    <enabled>false</enabled>
    <periodMs>1000</periodMs>
    <maxRows>200000</maxRows>
    <autoDownloadEvery>0</autoDownloadEvery>
    <filenamePrefix>dcdc_log</filenamePrefix>
    <logRegisters>view:status</logRegisters>
  </logging>
</modbus>
